latest.title: Blockchain Foundation — Base Wallet, OKToken, OKAssets
latest.summary: Adds non-custodial Base wallet, OKToken play-to-earn rewards, OKAssets NFT inventory cache, okama-wallet CLI, Settings > Wallet screen, manifest blockchain field validation, and post-game reward claim hook.
notes: New: on-device Base (EVM L2) wallet — BIP-39 keygen, JSON keystore v3 encrypted with Parent PIN.
New: okama-wallet CLI — init, address, balance, sign, assets, export, log.
New: wallet.py, nft.py, rewards.py added to /usr/lib/okamaos/.
New: okama-shell Settings > Wallet sub-screen — shows address, ETH, OKT, NFT asset count.
New: okama-run injects OKAMA_ASSETS_PATH and OKAMA_WALLET_ADDRESS env vars at game launch.
New: okama-run submits pending play-to-earn reward claims to OkamaLabs relay on clean game exit.
Improved: manifest.py validates optional blockchain: field (token_rewards, nft_assets).

channels.name: public-preview
channels.description: Fast-moving public preview channel for early OkamaOS users and creators.

channels.name: stable
channels.description: Reserved for signed production images after validation.
